content: Self-Refine’s iterative self-feedback pipeline can be reframed as a single-perspective precursor to multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid framework where coarse-to-fine self-refinement bootstraps more robust diverse-perspective reflection. This hybrid structure retains Self-Refine’s key advantage of requiring no additional training or supervision, while addressing the limitation of single-perspective blind spots that plagues basic Self-Refine systems.
